purpose: The ordered root-decision ladder for certifying a triliteral (or quadriliteral) root before authoring a scripture-facing gloss. Stop at the first rung that certifies. A heuristic root alone is never enough. norm() never certifies a root — it only assists lookup.

fields.certifies: true if this rung alone is sufficient to certify a root
fields.guard: constraints that must hold when relying on this rung

norm_never_certifies.rule: norm() (lenient recall key) drops the hamza seat and all harakāt. It may locate a candidate but MUST NEVER be the sole basis for certifying a root, lemma, or sense. Any authored root must additionally pass norm_strict() and agree with the QAC root.
violations_it_prevents: إِلَيْنَا certified as root ل ي ن (it is إِلَى + ـنا)
إِيمَان (أ م ن) collapsed onto أَيْمَان (ي م ن)
قُرْءَانًا split as stem + نا (it is tanwīn-alef ـًا)
مَالِكِ read as the phrase مَا لَكَ

ladder.use: An existing Qamus source entry whose root + headword match the token (verified via norm_strict, not norm) certifies the root directly.
ladder.guard: Match must hold under norm_strict() AND not be a homograph collision; if the entry's count/form is itself wrong, emit a repair candidate instead of trusting it.

ladder.use: The QAC per-word root/POS is authoritative INTERNAL morphology evidence and certifies the root when no Qamus entry exists yet.
ladder.guard: Use QAC internally only; never expose QAC/informed_by in a public artifact. The public record stays {src:'qamus', kind:'authored'}.

ladder.use: The owner's photographed dictionary page certifies the root when transcribing a new entry.
ladder.guard: Transcribe the root exactly as printed; it is scripture-adjacent content the owner verifies.

ladder.use: Triangulation across independent references certifies a root only when rungs 1-3 are unavailable.
ladder.guard: Never copy an external gloss text into the public artifact; use the reference only to confirm the root, then author original wording.

ladder.use: A morphological-shape heuristic (radical extraction by wazn) may PROPOSE a root for review.
ladder.guard: A heuristic root alone is NEVER enough for a scripture-facing gloss. Emit pending (reason source_evidence_needed). Hollow/weak/hamza-bearing stems are exactly where the heuristic lies — defer to QAC.

decision_rules.when: a rung with certifies==true matches under norm_strict()/QAC agreement
decision_rules.then: certify the root; proceed to the POS ladder.

decision_rules.when: only the heuristic rung (rank 5) produced a root
the only evidence is a norm() (lenient) match that does not survive norm_strict() or disagrees with QAC
a Qamus entry's root disagrees with the QAC root for the same token
decision_rules.then: do NOT author from the entry; emit a Qamus repair candidate with source address + field path.
